title: Critique inbox-driven manager-worker control plane
reviewQuestion: Does the implemented inbox-driven manager-worker control plane satisfy the finalized successor spec and closed tickets t-0031 through t-0039 while preserving ticket primacy, bounded manager scheduling, runtime portability, and the intended SDK-first/RPC-fallback architecture?
nonGoals: Do not critique unrelated pre-existing code outside the touched scope unless it is now made incorrect by the new control-plane work.
Do not demand a full actor mesh or sidecar architecture that this spec explicitly defers.
packetSummary: workspace:manager-worker-control-plane-next-phase; 5 focus area(s); 1 roadmap; 1 initiative; 2 research; 1 spec; 9 ticket
